descriptions.text: A game featured in Action 52. They are everywhere. Mean guys with nails that are nine inch knives and they like to slash everything that comes into there path. Don't get in their way or you're the next victim.

Slashers can refer to:

Slashers (film)
Slashers (slamball team)
Night Slashers, an arcade game
Longford Slashers, a Gaelic football team
Negros Slashers, a former professional basketball team
Los Angeles Slashers, a Slamball team
